license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y3qfymw
title: Yale - Blood Urea Nitrogen
author: John Stack

steps_raw.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for BUN analysis by running a multi analyte standard and two assayed control serums.

Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus. a) Cobas pipettes 2 µL of sample into a cuvette slot. b) Absorbance is measured at 340 nm. c) Add 200 µL of BUN liquid reagent. d) Mixture is incubated at 37ºC for 10 minutes. e) Absorbance is measured at 340 nm. Change in absorbance is calculated.
